items.text: You hand the professor's Cassette to the Academy's staff members and play the recorder...

items.speaker: Sestan
items.text: To anyone who comes across this recording, please tell my friends: I am deeply sorry for leaving you without a proper farewell.

items.speaker: Sestan
items.text: I would also like to ask you to proceed to the coordinates I'm about to reveal next. There, you will find the truth. The coordinates are...
